title: Cleanspark (CLSK) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
text: The 12 analysts covering CleanSpark stock have a consensus rating of Strong Buy and an average price target of $19.69, which forecasts a 98.49% increase in the stock price over the next year. The lowest target is $14 and the highest is $27. Cleanspark Inc has a consensus price target of $19.95 based on the ratings of 15 analysts, with the high of $27 issued by HC Wainwright & Co. on November 26, 2025, and the low of $14 issued by Cantor Fitzgerald on April 9, 2026. Recent analyst actions show JP Morgan changed their price target from $15 to $14 for Cleanspark Inc. Maxim raised the firm's price target on CleanSpark (CLSK) to $22 from $18 and keeps a Buy rating on the shares. Keefe Bruyette raised the firm's price target on CleanSpark (CLSK) to $16 from $14 and keeps an Outperform rating on the shares.
